---
title: "Gaben"
---

<meta name="slot-title-class" content="slot-title-gaben">

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button onclick="setZoom(0.9)">A−</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1)">A</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1.2)">A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', scale);
  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', scale);
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('site-zoom');
  if (saved) {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', saved);
  }

  const cls = document.querySelector('meta[name="slot-title-class"]')?.content;
  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");
  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```



## Übliche Form

[Anfangsformel] + [Aufzählung] mit/ohne [Attribut] + [Schlussformel]


## Anfangsformel

<div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Determinativ </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *pr.t-ḫrw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0001_Anrufungsopfer-Totenopfer/0001_pr.t-xrw_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0001_Anrufungsopfer-Totenopfer/0010_pr.t-xrw_02.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0001_Anrufungsopfer-Totenopfer/0020_pr.t-xrw_AR_01.png){.glyph} (AR) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0001_Anrufungsopfer-Totenopfer/det/0001_pr.t-xrw_det_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ein Anrufungsopfer bestehend aus </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Aufzählung

<div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Abkürzung </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Determinativ </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥnq.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0010_Bier/0001_Hnq.t_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0010_Bier/0010_Hnq.t_GR_01.png){.glyph} (Gr.) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0010_Bier/0020_Hnq.t_Abk_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0010_Bier/det/0001_Hnq.t_det_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0010_Bier/det/0010_Hnq.t_det_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Bier </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0020_Brot/0001_t_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0020_Brot/0010_t_Abk_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0020_Brot/det/0001_t_det_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0020_Brot/det/0010_t_det_02.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0020_Brot/det/0020_t_det_03.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0020_Brot/det/0030_t_det_04.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Brot </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜣpd* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0030_Gefluegel/0001_Apd_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0030_Gefluegel/0010_Apd_Abk_01.png){.glyph} (Abk.) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0030_Gefluegel/0020_Apd_Abk_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0030_Gefluegel/det/0001_Apd_det_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Geflügel </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *kꜣ* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0040_Rinder/0001_kA_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0040_Rinder/0010_kA_MR_03.png){.glyph} (MR) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0040_Rinder/0020_kA_NR_01.png){.glyph} (NR) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0040_Rinder/0030_kA_NR_02.png){.glyph} (NR) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0040_Rinder/0040_kA_Abk_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0040_Rinder/det/0001_kA_det_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Rinder </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *šs* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0050_Alabaster/0001_Ss_AR-MR_01.png){.glyph} (AR <br> MR) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0050_Alabaster/0010_Ss_Abk_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0050_Alabaster/0020_Ss_Abk_MR_01.png){.glyph} (MR) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0050_Alabaster/det/0001_Ss_det_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Alabaster </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mnḫ.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0060_Leinen/0001_mnx.t_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0060_Leinen/0010_mnx.t_NR_01.png){.glyph} (NR) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0060_Leinen/0030_mnx.t_Abk_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0060_Leinen/0040_mnx.t_Abk_NR_02.png){.glyph} (NR) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0060_Leinen/0050_mnx.t_Abk_GR_01.png){.glyph} (Gr.) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0060_Leinen/0060_mnx.t_Abk_GR_02.png){.glyph} (Gr.) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0060_Leinen/det/0001_mnx.t_det_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0060_Leinen/det/0010_mnx.t_det_02.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0060_Leinen/det/0020_mnx.t_det_NR_01.png){.glyph} (NR) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0060_Leinen/det/0030_mnx.t_det_NR_02.png){.glyph} (NR) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Leinen </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mrḥ.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0070_Salboel/0001_mrH.t_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0070_Salboel/0010_mrH.t_Abk_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0070_Salboel/0020_mrH.t_Abk_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0070_Salboel/det/0001_mrH.t_det_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0070_Salboel/det/0010_mrH.t_det_02.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0070_Salboel/det/0020_mrH.t_det_03.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Salböl </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *snṯr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0001_snTr_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0010_snTr_AR_01.png){.glyph} (AR) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0020_snTr_AR_02.png){.glyph} (AR) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0030_snTr_AR_03.png){.glyph} (AR) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0040_snTr_Ende-AR_01.png){.glyph} (Ende AR) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0050_snTr_MR_01.png){.glyph} (MR) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0060_snTr_MR_02.png){.glyph} (MR) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0070_snTr_MR_03.png){.glyph} (MR) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0080_snTr_D.18_01.png){.glyph} (Dyn. 18) <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0090_snTr_D.19_01.png){.glyph} (Dyn. 19) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0100_snTr_Abk_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0100_snTr_Abk_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/0120_snTr_Abk_03.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/det/0001_snTr_det_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/det/0010_snTr_det_02.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/det/0020_snTr_det_03.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0080_Weihrauch/det/0030_snTr_det_MR_01.png){.glyph} (MR) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Weihrauch </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *irp* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0090_Wein/0001_jrp_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0090_Wein/0010_jrp_Abk_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0090_Wein/0020_jrp_Abk_02.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0090_Wein/0030_jrp_Abk_NR_01.png){.glyph} (NR) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0090_Wein/det/0001_jrp_det_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0090_Wein/det/0010_jrp_det_AR_01.png){.glyph} (AR) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Wein </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Attribut

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḫꜣ (m/n)* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0100_tausend-an/0001_xA-m-n_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> tausend an </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Schlussformel

<div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *dd.t p.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0110_was-der-Himmel-gibt/0001_dd.t-p.t_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> was der Himmel gibt </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *qmꜣ.t tꜣ* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0120_was-die-Erde-hervorbringt/0001_qmA.t-tA_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0120_was-die-Erde-hervorbringt/0010_qmA.t-tA_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> was die Erde hervorbringt </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *inn.t ḥꜥpy* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0130_was-der-Nil-bringt/0001_jnn.t-Hapy_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0130_was-der-Nil-bringt/0010_jnn.t-Hapy_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> was der Nil bringt </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜥnḫ.t nṯr im* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0140_wovon-ein-Gott-lebt/0001_anx.t-nTr-jm_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> wovon ein Gott lebt </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mrr.t ꜣḫ.w wnm im* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0150_wovon-die-Ach-Geister/0001_mrr.t-Ax.w-wnm-jm_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> wovon die Ach-Geister sich zu ernähren lieben </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *(i)ḫ.t nb.t nfr.t wꜥb.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0160_Alles/0001_(j)x.t-nb.t-nfr.t-wab.t_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0160_Alles/0010_(j)x.t-nb.t-nfr.t-wab.t_02.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gaben/0160_Alles/0020_(j)x.t-nb.t_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> alle schönen reinen Dinge </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>



```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
